metadata.title_default: Spellhand · A specimen catalogue of the ASL fingerspelling alphabet
metadata.description: Learn the American Sign Language fingerspelling alphabet with your camera. A specimen-by-specimen field guide, built mobile-first.
metadata.og_description: A specimen catalogue of the ASL fingerspelling alphabet. Learn with your camera.
metadata.levels_description: Pick a level and start practicing the ASL fingerspelling alphabet with your camera. Four progressive levels plus a final memory Challenge.
metadata.challenge_description: The final exam. Spell every word from memory — no reference image — to earn your shareable Spellhand certificate.
metadata.play_description: Practice the Level {level} letters of the ASL alphabet with live in-browser hand tracking and per-finger feedback.
metadata.practice_description: Learn the ASL fingerspelling shape for the letter {letter} ({nato}). Live in-browser camera feedback with per-finger guidance.

hero.privacy_note: Camera stays in your browser · no video uploaded
hero.step_1_body: The camera tracks 21 points in your browser.
hero.step_2_body: Skeleton turns acid when correct. Hold to lock the letter.
hero.step_3_body: Finish the final Challenge, spell every word from memory.
hero.section_cert_body: Complete the Challenge, spell every word from memory, no reference. One certificate, signed and dated.
hero.cert_subtitle: for mastering the American Sign Language alphabet
hero.footer_tagline: A field guide to the ASL alphabet.

level_select.challenge_body: {letters} letters · {words} words · no reference image. Memory only.

level_intro.title: Level {n}.
level_intro.footnote: Look at the hand and copy the shape. {count} words to spell.

levels.1_blurb: Get ready to learn the letters A, B, C, E, L, O, V, W, U, Y.
levels.2_blurb: We add the letters D, F, I, K, R, S, T to your vocabulary.
levels.3_blurb: Ready for more, this time G, H, M, N, X.
levels.4_blurb: Two letters where you turn your hand downward, P and Q. (J and Z need motion and arrive in a future edition.)

play.hint_place_hand: Place your hand inside the frame.
play.hint_skipping: Skipping, this letter is on the bench.

challenge.no_password_note: We'll email you a sign-in link. No password needed.
challenge.sent_body_prefix: We sent a sign-in link to
challenge.sent_body_suffix: Click it to claim your certificate.
challenge.hint_place_hand: Place your hand inside the frame.
challenge.hint_skipping: Skipping, this letter is on the bench.

practice.hint_place_hand: Place your hand inside the frame.

claim.missing_body: Looks like you opened this page without completing the Challenge.

cert.subtitle: for mastering the American Sign Language alphabet
cert.share_text: I earned my Spellhand certificate, ASL fingerspelling alphabet, every letter from memory.
cert.page_description: {name} mastered the American Sign Language alphabet on Spellhand.

camera.permission_denied_body: Enable camera access for this site in your browser settings, then refresh.

hand_modal.body: Pick the hand you'll sign with. We'll mirror the reference to match.
